meaning: n.操纵木偶的人,操纵傀儡
examples: A a wandering puppeteer goes to a town.
Actually, when I was younger I wanted to be a puppeteer.
Puppets are happy to be puppets if puppeteer is a good puppeteer.
The dragon was made by theatre puppeteer Max Humphries in his workshop at Farnham Maltings, in Surrey.
Mr D'Alema appeared to orchestrate procedure so smoothly that he was soon viewed as the chief political puppeteer.
